rationale: The citing paper’s stated contribution and prior-work positioning are narrowly about Gaussian-copula endogeneity correction (CopulaOrigin/COPE/2sCOPE), while the cited paper is a randomized digital-ad experiment design (ghost ads) with no apparent link to the copula estimator development. The only match evidence is a bare DOI reference entry (no contextual quote), which suggests this is likely background/domain mention rather than a method, theory, or benchmark dependency.
